basic_details.job_title: NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 80 Medical Officer, Audiologist and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon (National Health Mission)
basic_details.short_information: NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon under the National Health Mission (NHM), inviting applications for 80 contractual posts across 17 cadres, including Cardiologist, Gynaecologist, Paediatrician, Anesthetist, Physician, Psychiatrist, Medical Officer (MBBS), Dentist, and other paramedical positions. Eligible candidates can apply offline between 6 July 2026 and 16 July 2026. This article covers the complete NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 notification, including vacancy details, eligibility criteria, age limit, salary,

important_dates.raw: Notification Release / Covering Letter Date: 3 July 2026 Application Start Date: 6 July 2026 Application Last Date: 16 July 2026 (during office hours, excluding holidays) Contract Validity: Up to 29 June 2027 (subject to continuation of the scheme) | Note: The official notification does not mention specific dates for interviews, merit list publication, or document verification. Candidates should regularly check the official website www.zpjalgaon.gov.in for further updates, as no separate individual notice, phone call, or email will be sent.

application_fee.details: The application fee must be paid through a Demand Draft (DD) only, drawn in favour of "District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon". Candidates must write their name and the post applied for on the back of the DD. Applications without a valid DD will be rejected regardless of the reason.

age_limit.details: Open Category: Maximum 38 years as on the date of application Reserved/Backward Category: Maximum 43 years as on the date of application Posts related to Nursing services: Maximum age limit is 65 years Candidates above 60 years of age must attach a physical fitness certificate issued by the District Civil Surgeon along with the application.

qualification.details: Educational qualification differs post-wise, ranging from MBBS/MD/MS/DM for medical specialist posts to BDS/MDS for Dentist, and diploma/degree qualifications for paramedical and technician posts. Refer to the vacancy table above for the exact qualification required for each post. Candidates whose mark sheets do not show percentage or who studied under a grading system must attach an attested photocopy of both sides of the mark sheet.

salary_details.details: Remuneration under NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 ranges from Rs. 17,000/- per month for Technician posts up to Rs. 1,25,000/- per month for the Cardiologist post. Teleconsultation posts (Physician and Paediatrician) are paid Rs. 300/- per teleconsultation instead of a fixed monthly salary. The remuneration mentioned against each post is consolidated, and no other allowances will be payable in addition to it.

selection_process: Qualifying Exam marks (final year), proportionate to 50% 50
Additional educational qualification beyond the minimum requirement, proportionate to 20% 20
Relevant work experience (6 marks per year, maximum 30 marks) 30
selection will be made through direct interview based on the following marking scheme (total 50 marks):

Subject Knowledge - 10 marks Research & Academic Knowledge - 10 marks Leadership Quality - 10 marks Administrative Abilities - 10 marks Experience - 10 marks (Government experience: 2 marks/year; Private experience: 1 mark/year; maximum 10 marks)
selection will be based on a 100-mark scheme as follows:
Candidates with equal marks will be given preference based on seniority by date of birth (older candidate preferred).
how_to_apply: Download the application format from the official website www.zpjalgaon.gov.in.
Fill in the application form completely in the prescribed format.
Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents along with page numbers written on each document.
Attach the Demand Draft of the applicable fee in favour of "District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon".

Submit the completed application by hand or by post to: National Health Mission, Health Department (New Building), Zilla Parishad, Jalgaon, between 6 July 2026 and 16 July 2026, during office hours (excluding holidays).
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post along with the separate applicable fee.
Applications received after the due date will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Notification Release / Covering Letter Date: 3 July 2026 Application Start Date: 6 July 2026 Application Last Date: 16 July 2026 (during office hours, excluding holidays) Contract Validity: Up to 29 June 2027 (subject to continuation of the scheme) Note: The official notification does not mention specific dates for interviews, merit list publication, or document verification. Candidates should regularly check the official website www.zpjalgaon.gov.in for further updates, as no separate individual notice, phone call, or email will be sent.

content_sections.heading: NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 80 vacancies are available across 17 different posts under various NHM sub-programmes such as NPCDCS, IPHS, DMHP, NOHP, NPPCD, NRC, and RBSK. The post-wise vacancy, qualification, place of posting, and remuneration are given below. Total Cadre: 17 | Total Vacant Posts: 80 Dental Hygienist: 12th with Science and Diploma in Dental Hygienist Course with State Dental Council Registration (2 years' experience) X-ray Technician: 10+2 with Diploma in relevant field (IPHS), with 1 year experience Dialysis Technician: 10+2 with Science & Diploma or Certificate Course in Dialysis Technology, with 1 year experience

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Educational qualification differs post-wise, ranging from MBBS/MD/MS/DM for medical specialist posts to BDS/MDS for Dentist, and diploma/degree qualifications for paramedical and technician posts. Refer to the vacancy table above for the exact qualification required for each post. Candidates whose mark sheets do not show percentage or who studied under a grading system must attach an attested photocopy of both sides of the mark sheet.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Open Category: Maximum 38 years as on the date of application Reserved/Backward Category: Maximum 43 years as on the date of application Posts related to Nursing services: Maximum age limit is 65 years Candidates above 60 years of age must attach a physical fitness certificate issued by the District Civil Surgeon along with the application.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Remuneration
content_sections.text: Remuneration under NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 ranges from Rs. 17,000/- per month for Technician posts up to Rs. 1,25,000/- per month for the Cardiologist post. Teleconsultation posts (Physician and Paediatrician) are paid Rs. 300/- per teleconsultation instead of a fixed monthly salary. The remuneration mentioned against each post is consolidated, and no other allowances will be payable in addition to it.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee must be paid through a Demand Draft (DD) only, drawn in favour of "District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon". Candidates must write their name and the post applied for on the back of the DD. Applications without a valid DD will be rejected regardless of the reason.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: For Super Specialist, Specialist, and Medical Officer (MBBS) posts, selection will be made through direct interview based on the following marking scheme (total 50 marks): Subject Knowledge - 10 marks Research & Academic Knowledge - 10 marks Leadership Quality - 10 marks Administrative Abilities - 10 marks Experience - 10 marks (Government experience: 2 marks/year; Private experience: 1 mark/year; maximum 10 marks) For all remaining posts, selection will be based on a 100-mark scheme as follows: Candidates with equal marks will be given preference based on seniority by date of birth (older candidate preferred).

rows.criteria: Qualifying Exam marks (final year), proportionate to 50%
Additional educational qualification beyond the minimum requirement, proportionate to 20%
Relevant work experience (6 marks per year, maximum 30 marks)

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Duly filled Application Form (Format A) Small Family Declaration Form Demand Draft (DD) for application fee Leaving Certificate (LC) / Transfer Certificate (TC) / Birth Certificate Caste Certificate (if applying under reserved category) Mark sheets related to educational qualification mentioned in the application Council/State Registration Certificate (where applicable) Government/Semi-Government/NHM experience certificate (if claiming experience marks) Any other relevant supporting documents Candidates must write the page number on every document attached with the application.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download the application format from the official website www.zpjalgaon.gov.in. Fill in the application form completely in the prescribed format. Attach self-attested photocopies of all required documents along with page numbers written on each document. Attach the Demand Draft of the applicable fee in favour of "District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon". Submit the completed application by hand or by post to: National Health Mission, Health Department (New Building), Zilla Parishad, Jalgaon, between 6 July 2026 and 16 July 2026, during office hours (excluding holidays). Candidates applying for more than one post must submit a separate application for each post along with the separate applicable fee. Applications received after the due date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q1. What is NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 is a contractual recruitment drive by the District Integrated Health & Family Welfare Society, Jalgaon, under the National Health Mission, to fill 80 vacancies across 17 medical and paramedical posts in Jalgaon district.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026 is 16 July 2026.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 80 vacancies across 17 cadres, including Cardiologist, Gynaecologist, Paediatrician, Anesthetist, Physician, Psychiatrist, MO MBBS, Dentist, Technician, Physiotherapist, Audiologist, Nutritionist, and Medical Officer RBSK.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 38 years for Open category candidates and 43 years for reserved/backward category candidates. For posts related to nursing services, the age limit is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 150/- for Open category candidates and Rs. 100/- for reserved category candidates, payable via Demand Draft only.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for NHM Jalgaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Super Specialist, Specialist, and MBBS Medical Officer posts are selected through direct interview (50 marks). All other posts are selected through a merit-based marking system (100 marks) based on qualifying exam marks, additional qualification, and relevant experience.
